Name: The naming of two thoroughfares and public places.
Title: A Local Law in relation to the naming of two thoroughfares and public places, Thierry Henry Way, Borough of Manhattan and Pelé Way, Borough of Queens, and the repeal of this local law upon the expiration thereof

History.Description: This Introduction was Introduced by Council
This Introduction was Referred to Comm by Council to the Committee on Parks and Recreation

Summary: This bill would co-name two thoroughfares and public places, based on requests of Council Members whose district includes the location.
Text:
Be it enacted by the Council as follows:
      
      Section 1. The following intersection name, in the Borough of Manhattan, is hereby designated as hereafter indicated.

New Name
Present Name
Limits
Thierry Henry Way 
None
At the intersection of West 50th Street and 6th Avenue
      
      �2. The following intersection name, in the Borough of Queens, is hereby designated as hereafter indicated.

New Name
Present Name
Limits
Pel� Way 
None
At the intersection of Shea Road and Meridian Road

      �3. This local law takes effect immediately and expires and is deemed repealed on 

November 1, 2026.

PM
